title: Bootstrap E2E: add BOOTSTRAPPED marker to pyproject.toml
summary: Add a comment '# bootstrapped by spec-orch' at the end of pyproject.toml to prove the pipeline can make a minimal change in a fresh environment. This is the simplest possible change that touches an existing file and can be verified by grep.
builder_prompt: Add a single comment line '# bootstrapped by spec-orch' at the very end of pyproject.toml. Do NOT change anything else. Do NOT modify any other file.
acceptance_criteria: pyproject.toml contains the line '# bootstrapped by spec-orch'

constraints: Do not change any existing content
